clipboardPaste.title: CLIPBOARD
clipboardPaste.turnOn: Turn on to allow pasting text from the clipboard with {{pasteHotkey}} during gameplay. NVIDIA does not store your text.
clipboardPaste.turnOff: Turn off to block pasting text from the clipboard with {{pasteHotkey}} during gameplay. NVIDIA does not store your text.

guestApp.turnOn: Turn on to start sharing the clipboard and allow pasting text with {{pasteHotkey}}.
guestApp.turnOff: Turn off to stop sharing the clipboard and block pasting text with {{pasteHotkey}}.
guestApp.turnOnHMD: Turn on to start sharing the clipboard and allow pasting text with Long Press {{pasteHotkey}}.
guestApp.turnOffHMD: Turn off to stop sharing the clipboard and block pasting text with Long Press {{pasteHotkey}}.

clipboardPaste.turnOnHMD: Turn on to allow pasting text from the clipboard with Long Press RB during gameplay. NVIDIA does not store your text.
clipboardPaste.turnOffHMD: Turn off to block pasting text from the clipboard with Long Press RB during gameplay. NVIDIA does not store your text.
